Class AbstractJsonRepository<T extends Identifiable<ID>, ID>

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.repository.AbstractJsonRepository<T,ID>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Repository<T,ID>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ApplicantProfileRepository, ApplicationRepository, JobRepository, ResumeInfoRepository, UserRepository, WorkloadRepository
public abstract class AbstractJsonRepository<T extends Identifiable<ID>, ID> extends Object implements Repository<T,ID>
